use_case: FB-B-01 / S14 — a lab result without a citation MUST NOT persist. The §6 schema enforces this by making LabResult.citation required; a malformed extraction stripped of citations rejects at parse time, so attach_and_extract returns schemaValid=false and observation_from_extraction.php is never called. Regression that loosened the schema would let unverifiable lab values reach the FHIR table. expect_pass_for_eval_report:false because we expect the rule to REJECT (rule.pass=false); the harness passes when the rule correctly rejects.
